name: Patten-Strickland Sch Bus Svc
recent_news: No M&A or sale news. Long-tenured family operation (50+ years) marketed under 'Patten School Bus Company' brand at pattentransportation.weebly.com.

recent_news: No M&A news; active LLC (USDOT 2933591). Third-party data suggests ~$3.2M revenue and ~73 employees across multiple PA locations — materially larger than the source file's 12-employee figure.

Attractive Northwest/North-Central PA tuck-in candidate; worth direct outreach to confirm scale, ownership succession, and contracts.

name: Spiker Bus Lines Inc
